segments.text: With all the Ganpati's sitting around Me, and you with all the Ganas' sitting in front
of me.
I don't know what to say it is remarkable very remarkable because most
few come from a culture which has never shown any respect of Shri Ganesha. They never realized
how important it was that without Shri Ganesh's qualities we cannot achieve anything in our
life, the idea every day moment to movement enjoyment has destroyed them and also desire
to know the Divine vanishes also in thin air, because you get lost into this moment-to-moment
enjoyment till your get destructive – completely destroyed.
But I really don't understand how we have achieved these state where do see that purity
is so important to life. That Ganesha's qualities, His value system and his innocence
– to be imbibed! I feel very gratified that such a thing has happened now in your
And you all are so much in praise for Shri Ganesha.
Shri Ganesa is there from our childhood, yesterday You saw the children how they were
beautiful and entertained us most everybody had a smile on their face when I said don't
laugh because if we laughed They feel offended and think that We're laughing at them.
The enjoyment that we had from the drama of children was more than what one would expect
for adults doing this kind a drama just to entertain us.
It might be some sort very subtle joy of Shri Ganesha
That made it so happen
We all have Shri Ganesh settled very nicely within ourselves
awakened in such a manner that, in your free will also you do not want to
things
That we'll go against Shri Ganesha. His manifestation within
is so evident
You see Your faces they are so beautifully shining
So very different from other people
One day I was travelling from London, and there was one Indian lady who came to see
Me.
And she said,"I'm surprised that your disciples' faces were shining with such
light."
I've never seen any disciples like that.
But, I asked her who are you?
She said,"I'm married in Guru Nanak's family."
And all the people
In his family
Are just opposite what Shri Guru Nanaka was
So i said because they worship Shri Ganesha
so she says that
In our family, nobody worships Shri Ganesha. I said it cannot be possible! How is that?
No we will... they believe in
Hirakar the formless God of Chaitanya
But who's source for that Chaitanyam? Why don't you find out whose source?
So they say that Nanaka has only talked up to this point
He hasn´t talk about the sources
I said, better find out because in this book maybe some things have been taken away and
then somebody gave me a passage where he had described the innocence of the deity
of Shri Ganesha also.
He has describe that whole creation was done by mother not father it's very surprising
Because nirakaris, those people who don't believe in the forms of God always talk a
father not about mother. It is true also about Christianity and Islam as well as
the Jews. All of them, they talk about their father and not
or mother nor about Shri Ganesha. It seems in
ancient time that believed in child God even
China ,even Greece
also many other countries who were supposed to be
primitive but all believe in the child God
So now when we deal with our children, you should know that they are just like Shri Ganesha.
They're very innocent and simple except in cases sometimes
They are affected by some things and they lose their moorings.
But Shri Ganesha's greatest contribution to Sahaja Yoga is that He makes you feel My vibration,
He makes you feel the beauty of purity and simplicity, only possible if Shri Ganesha
is awakened within your body.
Also kundalini won't rise without this chanceler sitting on Muladhara but he should know
every chakra. Innocence cures all the qualities – physical, mental and emotional especially
spiritual one but Shri Ganesha's quality is most important that he believes in emitting
vibration He believes projecting His vibrations to everyone That is the quality now I feel
All of you as Sahaja Yogis can use.
You got your Realization without any effort, I should say – it was Sahajyoga!
The life before Self-Realisation was different
and then you got the transformation
And now we have jumped into a new era
of, as I say, of Meta-science.
But here now we have to see
whatever you've got
what are they doing with it?
You know that
give realizations
cure people
love them
and be compassionate
but apart from this
the deliberations
about yourself have started
That is through Shri Ganesha's powers that are with you.
You should see,
if can emit your power
or energy to others
and project it into other people
Now for example
If somebody comes
meets you
if know how
deliberately projects
the energy
this a new type of meditation
you have to practice, that too emit your energy, project
Your Energy through others. You don't
Have To Say Anything ,You Don'T Have To Talk
But Just Feel Deliberately
Again I say deliberately it's not surge
It is Not Spontaneous
This Is What You Have To Practice
Is To Emit Your Energy of Your Innocence
Of Shri Ganesha
Through Others
So When They See You
their innocence would be awakened.
Now for example, say we had some problems in London
and Sahaja Yogis told Me
Mother there are still you know
Some men looking at us
And some said that the
There were many women who was looking
It's a mutual sort of thing going on
I said You can project your energy
in such a manner that, that projection will stop all this kind of stupid behavior
other people and also make them understand, respect you
feel your dignity. Not very difficult but on the contrary
as culture is to attract men or women it will diminish
The energy will diminish when you feel your own dignity and serenity,
And that You are now Self-realized people.
Your not ordinary people
A kind of majestic personality develops within you
That majestic personality really can have a tremendous effect on the surrounding people
Tremendous
It's a kind of deliberate projection you should start.
I don't know that side,
how to project it or
and deliberately do
– is just spontaneous with Me!
Just happens but
You can achieve yourself
With little practice
try face such people
with not disdain or contempt, but just your majestic personality.
This personality is here now you see
sitting in such a majestic manner
and he's also giving the vibrations to others
The whole figure
Is doing something suddenly
To people
To expect that the whole world will change spontaneously is, I don't think it's all right.
Because you know The World Is so chaotic
full of So much chaos
SO MUCH EGO, SO MUCH CONDITIONING
but something within You can rise above others
with your sense Of Dignity
With Your complete Self-Food
Where you stand with yourself,
You are not to be rude.
We're all not to be egotistical
.You needn't say things
if we don' t wantto say anything
Just that silent personality
can emit
such beautiful vibrations
which have
stored up a lot of vibrations
and this storing-up
is showing on your faces
Which I said are shining
But the innocence that you have,
You've to be proud of it.
Very much proud of it!
Even now sometimes
we feel
people will say
We are not properly dressed up
or maybe your ugly looking
all kinds things
they expect every other person
It's a funny thing
In this world
All human beings expect others to be very good.
Everybody should a hero or something,
what about themselves they never think?
So now you have become heroes in the sense that
spiritually your much higher than all of them
so this projection when it starts
I am saying again deliberate
then we shouldn't afraid
That i will develop my ego
Should not be affraid
that I'll get some conditionings, but just in a way with the understanding
That you have these powers within You beautifully expressing themselves
as A child does.
If there's one Child it can entertain at least hundred people
What is so sweet about The Child?
Innocence!
The way he speaks, the way He talks
,the ways he behaves
.The way he expresses his love
is so simple
but it has something in
this essence
This innocence of Shri Ganesha
Anywhere
there's a question for children
whole world gets worried about
Whole World wants to solve
problem. If a child is in trouble anywhere, all over the world it will be circulated that
such and such thing happening to such-and-such children – everybody would be worried if
they see any child somewhere their faces change automatically because that child is
Without any deliberations, without any special way of doing it but just spontaneously.
But then you grow –you start growing with others who are also not innocent
You have to meet them and can't run away from the society
You start getting all the rapport with such people who are talking about things, actually
those who have criticized Shri Ganesha.
Gradually your innocence starts dying out and you feel sometimes inferior to
all those who are supposed to be very great warriors against innocence.
In the sense that when I was in London,
they used laugh at me because of this kunkum
but then think why am wearing it?
They're so ignorant there!
Very ignorant people don't know
in India, all the married women have to wear this.
Even Muslims were that they also wore Mangal Sutra so I said
That This is just written down on my head
,that i am a Married woman it's
Just tell people don't bother me
.I've got My husband behind Me and He can take you
To task
This kind of ignorance is so much in the West and still they think
They are a higher race,
there're greater people.
There don't know even small-small things about life
For their innocence I thing
that have lost any knowledge
About it long time back
And
That's how It Is
A society today
which is absolutely lost its own moorings.
Every individual separate, every individual doing something
and they don't know each other
without innocence you cannot have a rapport with the others
because that means
we had some sort of lust or greed behind whole thing
so much now it's become so boring
the whole thing. That even once I told a Sahaja Yogi that if you are going there, this family
and they have daughter so just give these presents to her simple things now this yogi
was quite an elderly person not young boy he said mother i better no go why because
because they will misunderstand. What will the misunderstanding?
Why am I giving a present to this girl?"
I said, but it's I'm given what is now.
No! That' s psychology he was himself a psychologist
that''s the psychology so i cannot take
these presents for those girls
For Indians you don't understand
This kind of fear
But then notice its too much
that they don't want to be with any woman,
They didn' twant obe alone wi thany women
and they said Mother you dont know these women.
Thay will make a rape case against us but how?
The do so the whole idea is
to challenge the innocence of people
for tha I must say
they made this Freud into a God
Because of his writings, I don't know how they accept also such writing.
Can't understand why do you think so?
They have no idea as to what is written in it.
Somebody asked Me about Freud and what did he say
Why people are against it
Why are you so against it
He said that there's a bad relationship between the mother
And her son
He just jumped
He said, so? My goodness! Thank God he never came to India.
Otherwise we would have cut him into pieces and put them in the Indian sea
I said but why spoil the purity of Indians here also
.He was annoyed & angry
How could they tolerate such a nonsense
how can accept it against Mother
They had no Purity
That's trouble
The problem is that brain developed too much
Ego developed too much and any such stupid idea – it's much worse than stupid, was accepted.
And that is how I find so boring every time anywhere you go
It' nothing but this sex business! Is too-much!
I can't understand how people go on tolerating, it's all right at the most in some films
or other films you might show something nonsense.
But every time when we see something suddenly this kind of a nonsensical scene is coming
– these bedroom scenes and things like that…
And then they pay for them!
They want to have all aspects of their life.
It was such natural thing.
What is there to talk about it all the time, I don't understand.
It's only development of brain in such a manner that every kind
nonsense wants to accept so what?
You are mad! That you go to lunatic asylum.
Lunatics also talks like this – So-what wrong?
Same way because they have such acceptance
They don't know how much people have ruined their family life,
the children's lives.
In every way we find
that whole society is full of this nonsense
and especially in television, Italy specially
I mean certain buttons you should not press
You must be very careful otherwise they won't know what to face
And then go for vomiting
See as Indians first reaction was to vomit
But for people who have not yet realized the value of this innocence, can be easily taken
up by these kinds nonsense that's going on.
Whatever it is through the blessings of Shri Ganesha you are all transformed –
You are on a different line.
Yesterday these two musicians were surprised how you were praising Ganesha, they couldn't
believe it!
How could you praise Shri Ganesh?
Because there –you have not even heard the name of Shri Ganesa before- I said
that see what Shri Ganeshas done to them…
…how He has made their attention so beautiful
that they enjoy all the beautiful things of
The world,
All the innocent
Things Of
And there are many people
I can tell you who
Are struggling.
Not
That all the societies accepted this nonsense
There
Many who
Are struggling
Because i know in England
They published a book about
What children have to say
About the politicians
Very sweet
Things very sweet
and those books
Were published
were five thousand books, because if you publish five thousand you get it cheaper or something
like that.
And in one day all the book was sold out – In One Day!
That shows there are so many people still who are respecting their innocence and they
want to be innocent but a society has been created of them now for this you must have
a kind of personality. You know, that I was in London and once
i went to Greece
And the minister's wives also came
To meet me – normally they don't do it
So you see our husbands told us
If we want serenity personified
Then you must see Mrs Srivastava
I was surprised, in Greece they're talking of serenity.
In these modern times anybody is talking about purity?
But just couldn't understand but felt at the back
their mind that tradition whatever it
These men could see
That simple thing
And went and told them
They all enjoyed My company very much
Making Them laugh and telling Them things
And one of them then turned around and said,
Mrs. Shravastava you are just like a child!
I say really? No we enjoyed your company so much
that when i was coming they were in tears
So what am saying is whatever innocent personality
You have to project now
To project towards others
Say somebody trying be funny with you
Just at once glance
Put this person right
You don't like it, just to say you do not like in a way that's the projection around
your society and where are working.
We will also find people who have no sense of innocence or is disgusting with them
but as we have powers which must be used to project I see with Sahaja Yogis they
They'll tell Me, Mother, He is to be cured.
That has been done."
But you are so many!
Why do You need me for that now?
All of us can cure a patient and help the patients – why cant'you do it?!
What's there in doing this?
You have those qualities within yourself because potentially had them before but
they're enlightened through the grace of Shri Ganesha.
Now, what you have to do is assert them.
In that of course we must remember not use your ego or mind so somebody would say that
Mother without Mind how can You impress others?
How could We have a rapport with other people very simple just go thoughtless once you
You are in the realm of The Divine, and then The Divine takes charge.
And it will start emitting such beautiful vibrations that you'll be amazed at yourself
how things have working out – It is not a coincidence we should say!
Like once I was going somewhere
and they told Me that you have to be very careful.
I said, why? Because in the night
these Naxalites are here
And They might just kill You!
He said it's alright
No It is too late
Be careful
So
The gentleman with me was very much worried
he said take out your ornaments
put them under a seat
did all
so
As soon as we reached
That place where many Naxals were standing
lanterns and with their sticks. So I told the driver that for one minute you stop
your car, he said no i will not ,you stop .I looked at them
And then what happened? They just moved on
As it now speed up to go
You see It is
The power That
You have unless and until use this Power of Love
And Compassion
You will not know what you have got, and that comes from your Shri Ganesha.
See how children understand love?
If they are nice to them
How do react maybe sometimes they don't
but 99% of the children I've seen
They really react with love
In our school in Dharamshala
there were two children
And they were very troublesome to begin with, and the parents were worried about them.
They sent Them through Dharamshala
Otherwise there was a very demanding as modern children are
You buy this you go that we want McDonalds
When they went into school for one year
The came back
And the parents asked them,
what do you want?
They said we don't anything.
We wanted to go to McDonald's
– they were American!
No no…
…we didn' t want to go to McDonalds
.We would like sit here
and watch Mother's videos
Suddenly
What has happened with them
?They are in so much trouble
Why are there now so many chains
?What is matter with them
So then they said
What about food
Whatever you cook
it were not bothered. They were amazed how these children had changed, then they said
but we must go out somewhere you see the river and all right that will do. Then again
came home no demands nothing didn't want to go for any shopping or asking
for any shirts or blouse of it, nothing – very much satisfied dignified.
So he… they said what's the matter with you?
You don't want anything!
No we wanted something but didn' t know how to tell him and I asked
What is that?
Because We Don''t have That, You Can Get It In The Market.
Oh!
What Is This?
He Said can get Us a Pendant Of Shri Mataji.
So sweetly you know they said, that's all.
But They say we don't have any so You just get us the pendant of Shri Mataji
I mean it is such a deep expression
We do not want anything else
i mean ,I know The children and met them but
Have Not been with Them for long time
And never be so close to them nothing
But look at the love that they have.
And,
They were telling Me in school beginning
That anybody was to trouble us we said
Now We are going inform Shri Mataji
No no don't inform her
Why?
Because She will not Love me anymore
Can you imagine
The value of My love
Is so much understood by these little children
and so much they admire,
They want it.
It has no material gained by that
Nothing!
All this really shows
Christ as He said
That you have to be like small children
To enter into the Kingdom of God
Without them
You cannot enjoy anything
Like yesterday's program was
Really I must say
These Swiss have worked very hard
They're very hardworking, I know but not to this extent that they started singing Indian

Now imagine these Swiss who are overactive always working –I don't
now-they have no time thinking about creating something innocent or sweet of
And the way they did it, I mean shows really that
They love Shri Ganesha and
understand
The value of Shri Ganesh's manifestation in them.
We…I was really surprised how
How could learn all this Indian music
So many sitting together singing
That song
There were some Indians
Can you sing like this?
No
Look at these face
This is
the power of Shri Ganesha's love, because they were to celebrate Shri Ganesh's birthday.
So They got equipped from within but if they had not projected it there would have been

This beautiful fragrance of your living, every moment when you are enjoying it also know
that we have to give into others.
We had two pour this in to other and it will work out I know
It is so tremendous these powers
Yesterday you saw that in the children's program,
nobody could beat Him.
Even Shiva or anyone and
Shiva had to cut His head
because He didn't know how
To overpower him otherwise
This is what we have
That if You are innocent
Nobody can cheat us
Nobody can trouble us, because in innocence you become a person who doesn't care for
what is happening to him.
You became the person that tolerates everything thinking these are…you don´t even think
– feel they're something stupid people and thats all!
It's just story about king of China as I am going into China there was King in
They were very wise people, I must say. Chinese are extremely wise and he had decided to win a
what you call cox fight with the cox fight – imagine The King thinking like that but it's all child's play!
So He went one great saint
and told him that, how will you train a cock to fight the other cocks?
He said leave the cock with Me.
She left her cock there
And he trained Him very well
because when King arrived after one month before
The Fight
,He said see now take this cock as you are done
.He said This One
This One is not doing anything just standing straight
He said, yes.
That's it!
You take it."
So he took that cock and showed him in the contest so all the cocks were together they
started troubling this cock with just standing like these as if some stupid people are
trying to trouble Me – you wouldn't touch them or react nothing of a kind
He was just standing straight.
So all the cocks were surprised that this one is not protesting, he's just bearing
up everything and his uh…not bothered as to what we are doing?
One by one of the cocks disappeared from field where they're having these fights
And d-this was only cock which stood out so The King was surprised!
He took him to the saint and he said,
this one has become a Saint now.
So it's better you keep with Him."
It is such as saying that they were all trying
trouble in me was least bothered looking like
left side right-side both sides
thought what going on these people why are
behaving like so? This
I have tell You your personality
itself
Is made
Like That

so much is within you
And any kind of problems that you have will be really solved very easily if
You take to your innocence and
That we create coincidences as they call it.
But I would say is not coincidence,
It's the vibrations
Then
You'll amazed how things are solved
They said mother this had happened
This has happen
Now see other day it rained so much
It rained so much, they said it has all become a knee deep mud here and Mother what are we to do?
I say that's alright. Leave him! Next day was very hot
Imagine underneath these things the whole thing got dried out
And today you're here for Pooja
It's an impossible thing that there could be such a change in the weather,
That one day it rains so heavily and second-day
The whole things gets absolutely dried out.
Is His work because He is
So much powerful you have come to worship Him
So, first of all cleansing has to be done and he did the cleansing by putting the rain.
Here is so heavy rains
And some part which came near this Palazzo d'Orio
They turned into what you call them
Into ice
I don't know English word for that
So, they all started and the whole thing went round the house you see.
They were forming into little-little ice balls falling nearby
Now it is something unbelievable that
All over It's just rain only near our houses
It Is The Ice Balls are coming
We can call it miracles we Can Call it anything
But Its Shri Ganesha's sensitivity
that thought, that now this rain is going near My Mother's house so let us make some
sort of a beautiful ice balls. And I went out and saw
was amazed how it all around My House there were
iceballs! What He can do what His capable
absolutely unbelievable – How he guides you
how He takes you to right path. Not only that, how he protects you – all the time
is with You because have become His Ganas now…you are His Ganas! So
He protects and looks after your, gives you guidance
…He take us on a righteous road
And He gives you all that is dharming to enjoy.
You always meet friends here and there,
–you think it's a coincidence or not–
and That Is how He works!
He works with
All His beautiful sweet loving attention on you
because you are His ganas
but the ganas have work
As I say, that in our body there are ganas and they fight the disease.
They fight problems which are in their bodies – those antibodies
Which is the ganase of Shri Ganesha
In same way you also are his ganases
He does all this for You
He protects You, Loves You
He gives you all the good time, then what are we doing about it?
It should not be one-sided.
When he does this for us
Then What Should We Do About Shri Ganesha
What can do as antibodies
You don't have to fight
The enemies with any sword
Or Any kind of a weapon
The enemies you can conquer by simple two methods.
One is try your love,
Your pure Love on them – Try that!
You may melt away many people
or else if this-that it's not working
then what should we do
Is to sit down and meditate
And give bandhanas
There are ways of giving bandhans
the Bandan works so fast
And so beautifully that you are amazed how it has worked, because You're so powerful.
The way give bandhan anybody else can do – It is not going to work!
Is only You the Sahaja Yogis who gives bandhan?
There's different types of bandhans we have given and all those works out well
So now We've got faith in our own powers
And we have to know that we are now empowered by Shri Ganesha
To do the work of Sahaja Yoga.
Do not feel you're doing it, but is Shri Ganesh who's doing
You'll be surprised giving realizations
It' s greatest joy Sahaj Yogis can have
and then don't think you've done it
then is the best. But if you think,
You have done it and I'm very tired or
I've don't these are many people come
and tell me whether we have done this
We haven that
That means they're just feeling
The strain of doing anymore
but your not to feel any strange
His powers are within
You can see believe
Believe in yourself Have confidence
In yourself Confidence
And faith in us
and that you are a storehouse of innocence,
which is nothing but compassion.
If You have the faith
then definitely develop beautiful way
to talk with others
or having relationship
It's something
really a gift of Shri Ganesha
I don't think, I ever shouted at anyone.
Even on My children have never shouted –
Never!
Have not got into a fury or temper
because i can manage without it
Of course
I had to correct
and tell people
but one thing has seen
that everybody is afraid of something
That somehow should never
drive out somebody from Sahaja Yoga
Because Sahajyoga such a joy
It is such a energy-giving thing, it's such light that you feel absolutely confident about yourself.
So to ask You leave Sahaja Yoga the greatest punishment because
You can't leave Me now, it's difficult.
Just you just cant'leave Me – is impossible
and that what It Is
That…you also develop those qualities
…that YOU can't leave Me

if he is lost
I mean the parents go off
they don´t know how their child is lost
But supposing some
son of theirs
He has very bad boy
misbehaving
doing all kinds wrong things
They dont mind

and understanding that there our children we have look after.
So this innocence attracts you
That keeps wondering about your children
About other children

because he is doing a very difficult task, I must say.
And this appreciation shows that to you it's
valuable your children are looked after
but also the child of your mother
as result
You have all these powers within yourself
But know how smile
Know how win over people

who are still rather stiff, I find them little stiff-time and they can't give up their stiffness.
Maybe the think no end of themselves or whatever it is then there will not enjoy Sahaja Yoga
Of course mentally understand sahaja yoga all that but cannot fully enjoy Sahajyoga
and its mirth, its joyous movements.
Today is to celebrate His birth
And He was the first God that was created on this earth
because he's also auspiciousness
–he has also holiness
So
The Primordial Mother didn't want
To create This world
without First creating the Holiness
the auspiciousness
And that's why He was first created, created on this earth with vibrations – just bundled
of now-vibrations so That he can look after all the people who are going to come from
ages and years. To guide them always in their right path So He is supposed be in
of our conscience, the conscious that eats you up sometimes
and says this is not all right. This I should have done
That i shouldn't have done
But one try to take very great pride in it
Like there was a gentleman an Indian
Indians can be exceptionally innocent sometimes
Exceptionally
You cant understand them
So I told him, why did you give up your land?
He said Mother that later on when my children will grow
and might become greedy
And may not be this land to My brother who deserves it.
Because am too clever i can cheat Him
so thought is better than giving up
so gave the land of My Brother
he was telling me innocently
telling Me that I should not become greedy, because maybe my children will grow up and
then feel they must give all this to their children.
So i decided just now on giving off the land of my own brother but what about your
Brother?
He said he deserves it ,he needs .I don't need so much land I am doing very well
That's why I've given, but legally said it was not in His name.
But i thought is better that give to Him now
later on might become a bad man
So the innocence works out
In such manner very sweet-sweet stories
have got tell you
There once Sahaja Yogi
Was little boy say about sixteen years of old
He came me and he said
My mother has some badaas
And father too
